calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Miles Lendway, CSR#13684.
Petitioners Shanxi Lin and Bi Qiu Li; father and mother of minor present in court.
Petitioners sworn and examined through Mandarine Interpreter/Yuhan Chi.(Court's Employee)
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Shqolong Lin to Devin Lin.
The court also grants the petition for Name Change for mother form Bi Qiu Li to Gina Lin.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
